p.strong: Decision Tree: '/' Character — Division vs. Line Comment vs. Block Comment
p.em: Maximal munch: '/' prefers the longer comment form when applicable

div.p: Consumed so far: // Loop: while not is_at_end() AND peek() != '\n': → advance() (discard) Stop before consuming \n (left for main loop as whitespace)
Consumed so far: /* Loop: while not is_at_end():

ul.li: else: advance() (discard; tracks \n) EOF exit → emit ERROR

div.p: Maximal Munch Invariant '/' prefers the longer form:

ul.li: Mirrors = preferring == over ASSIGN + ASSIGN Two-char check must precede SINGLE_CHAR_TOKENS lookup. '/' was removed from that dict.
